evals.prompt: Split a markdown doc with two sections using chunk_policy. Does every child chunk resolve to a parent?
evals.expected_output: All children have parent_id present in the same batch; orphan_chunks returns empty.

evals.prompt: What metadata fields are required on every chunk record?
evals.expected_output: doc_title, doc_version, source_type; optional environment defaults to agent-rules.

evals.prompt: How is embed text framed for contextual retrieval?
evals.expected_output: doc_title > section_path prepended before chunk body.
